sections.title: PPE Issuance and Inspection Log (continued 2)
sections.html:
Supervisor Review

ACKNOWLEDGMENT

MH Construction requires all employees to wear appropriate Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) in all designated work areas and when performing tasks with identified hazards. PPE must be inspected prior to each use to ensure it is in safe working condition. Defective or damaged PPE must be immediately removed from service and reported to a supervisor for replacement. This policy complies with the requirements set forth in 29 CFR 1926 Subpart E and WAC 296-155-200.

I acknowledge that I have read, understand, and agree to comply with the MH Construction PPE Issuance and Inspection Policy as required by 29 CFR 1926 Subpart E and WAC 296-155-200.
